mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate below 4.5% signals accommodative monetary policy, reducing borrowing costs and boosting equity valuations, which predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS is below 4.5%, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 150k jobs signals robust labor market conditions, increasing consumer spending and corporate earnings, which predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances with PAYEMS growth above 150k, or t-test p > 0.1 for mean returns in high PAYEMS periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production above 103.5 indicates strong manufacturing activity, increasing corporate profits and stock valuations, which predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO exceeds 103.5, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and housing starts signals strong aggregate demand, driving corporate revenue and stock prices, which predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where both GDPC1 and HOUST are rising, or interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by rising FEDFUNDS above 4.5%, increase discount rates and reduce equity valuations, which predicts negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%, or t-test p > 0.05 for mean returns in tightening periods.

mechanism_narrative: Low inflation below 2% CPI signals stable price environment, supporting central bank policy flexibility and positive equity risk appetite, which predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL is below 2%, or Rank IC < 0.01 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer spending, indicated by rising RSAFS above 720k, boosts corporate revenues and stock prices, which predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of instances where RSAFS exceeds 720k, or t-test p > 0.1 for mean returns in high RSAFS periods.

mechanism_narrative: A tight labor market, indicated by UNRATE below 4.0%, signals wage pressures and strong corporate pricing power, which predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE is below 4.0%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.
